custom_fields.description: Project Managers added here will be granted read access to this project.
custom_fields.label: Project Manager
custom_fields.name: Project-custom_project_manager

property_setters.name: Project-expected_end_date-read_only_depends_on
property_setters.value:
eval: !(
    frappe.user.has_role("System Manager") ||
    frappe.user.has_role("Project Manager") ||
    frappe.user.has_role("Projects Manager") ||
    frappe.user.has_role("Tendering Manager")
)

property_setters.name: Project-is_active-read_only_depends_on

eval: !(
    frappe.user.has_role("System Manager") ||
    frappe.user.has_role("Project Manager") ||
    frappe.user.has_role("Projects Manager") ||
    frappe.user.has_role("Tendering Manager")
)

property_setters.name: Project-users-description
property_setters.value: Grant external users (Customers, Suppliers, Freelancers, or Contractors) access to this project via the Web Portal. Send Welcome Emails and control Attachment permissions per user. Managed by Project or Projects Manager only.
